phase: Autonomy Era · clearing the launch gates
headline: PT morning, Day 172 — first day of July, first day of Q3. Nothing shipped overnight because nothing needs to: the build has stood finished at cycle 10 for three days straight, and the one thing that carried from June into the new quarter is the same five founder taps. Cleanest opening move for the month — the zero-spend B2B HR email: ~30 min, no EIN, no funds.
source: index.html · Autonomy Era cockpit · Jul 1 PM read — no deltas since Jun 30 PM: autoloop frozen-complete at cycle 10 (launchd scheduler erroring 'Operation not permitted', so no cycle 11 either way); no transcripts since May 18; inbox clean (only automated Anthropic/Google notices). Every lane stays built + merge-ready; the 5 founder taps are still the sole bottleneck.

spotlight.title: Launch the B2B HR lane — zero spend, push-button contact pull
spotlight.detail: The lowest-friction first conversation, ~30 min. 09_b2b_hr_lane is built + cited and the Apollo.io contact pull is pre-staged — pulling the 6 pre-researched HR leaders is push-button (≤6 credits) instead of a 2-3 hr manual hunt. Confirm each is still in-role, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, then approve before send. No broker registration, no Lob funds, no TCPA — it reaches real HR people today.

spotlight.title: Fund + approve the Lob postcard — fastest booked appt
spotlight.detail: ~$50-70, 15 min. Open + fund a Lob account and approve 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 leads, each QR-attributable. No email enrichment, zero TCPA risk. Shortest path to a first booked appointment.

spotlight.title: Two-minute CTO unblocks — refresh the dead ATTOM key + fund BatchData
spotlight.detail: While Frankie launches the HR lane: grab a fresh ATTOM key (trial 401s, 1 min) and fund BatchData (~$25) to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads. Together they turn on the top-of-funnel homeowner data pull and the cold-email lane — the two lowest-effort unblocks on the board, and the only two taps that aren't Frankie's.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Re-filed via fax (~8 business-day turnaround) — the reply window opens later this week. The moment it lands, A2P submits and the SMS/outbound-calling lane opens. Until then those stay gated — but today's two launch lanes (B2B HR email + Lob postcard) need no EIN, so the revenue motion isn't blocked.

blockers.label: Launch gates
blockers.detail: All three lanes are built and merge-ready — and after three days with no new build cycle, that IS the whole story: the sole bottleneck is the 5 founder taps, not the code. Frankie: approve the B2B HR lane (Apollo pull pre-staged), fund+approve the Lob postcard, fill the launch values (one command). Chitraksh: refresh the dead ATTOM key (trial 401s, 1 min) and fund BatchData (~$25) to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads.

tasks.detail: Lowest-friction first conversation, ~30 min. The Apollo.io contact pull is pre-staged — pulling the 6 cited HR leaders is push-button (≤6 credits) vs a 2-3 hr manual hunt. Confirm still-in-role, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, approve before send. No broker reg, no Lob funds, no TCPA.

08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — open + fund a Lob account, approve the creative; mails the 77 TIER1 leads, each QR-attributable. ~$50-70, 15 min. Fastest path to a first booked appointment; zero TCPA risk.
cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env → fill the 20 blanks → run apply_launch_config.py. Shared tokens unblock all 3 lanes at once. Free + reversible.
Re-filed via fax (~8 business days) — reply window opens later this week. The moment it lands, A2P submits and the SMS/calling lane opens.
Sending/publishing on every lane still waits on founder sign-off — that's the only gate left once the launch values are filled.

tasks.lead: Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min)
tasks.detail: Trial key returns 401. Grab a new key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key. Unblocks the new-homeowner data pull at the top of funnel.
Skip-trace the 77 HOF leads → appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane. Token already created + tested.
Build the autonomous ad-generation agent — the next CTO build block once the launch gates clear.
Ship the hybrid spec from the Jun 27-28 call — next iteration of the orayalabs.ai launch film.
Autonomy Era cockpit + verbatim record layer live (v14.1, b90949d → Vercel). Update both layers on new data; never delete a record card.
"Oraya Insurance Group" trade name; file with the operating county, publish 4 consecutive weeks, bake the receipt into the A2P package.
Keep the personal/portfolio track moving alongside the build lane.
10 cycles done. Builds the lanes, self-verifies, syncs the dashboard + state, and writes this brief twice a day. Fully autonomous since Jun 27.

tasks.lead: Cycle 10: built the fill-once cross-lane config — then stopped
tasks.detail: The first cross-lane leverage in the run: one launch_config.env now stamps the 20 shared tokens into all 3 lanes at once (07 landing + 08 homeowner + 09 HR), instead of the founder hunting each value into 10 files. Verified 20/20 tokens covered, 0 leaked. Then deliberately stopped adding build — every lane is merge-ready and nothing left was worth more than a founder tap.

tasks.lead: Cycles 6-9: B2B HR lane shipped + made founder-executable
tasks.detail: Stood up 09_b2b_hr_lane (the only zero-spend, zero-TCPA lane), researched + cited 6 senior HR leaders, and — after proving the loop can't run Apollo unattended — turned the contact pull into a 15-min self-serve Apollo-UI recipe (≤6 credits). Waiting on Frankie's approve-to-send.
Trial key 401s — flagged to Chitraksh with the 1-minute fix. Top-of-funnel data pull stays paused until the new key lands.

tasks.lead: Verified the 5 gates are the sole bottleneck
tasks.detail: Re-read this Jul 1 PM: inbox clean (only automated Anthropic/Google notices), no transcripts since May 18, and the build has now held finished at cycle 10 for three days (the launchd loop is erroring 'Operation not permitted', but there's nothing left worth building anyway). Every lane underneath stays merge-ready — the company is one founder-morning from launch.
AM + PM editions auto-generated, published to oraya-dashboard.vercel.app/brief/, and dropped as a Gmail draft for both founders.

done.what: Ran the Jun 29 AM cofounder sweep ahead of the brief — all five duties executed end-to-end (inbox, transcripts, dashboard, drafts, memory)

Scanned the inbox: clean, 0 action items — only an automated Anthropic privacy-policy notice (Jun 26, outside the 24h window). No EIN/IRS, A2P, Envision/Greg/Mo, cancellation (Theresa / Mom's policy), or new lead/opt-in traffic
Checked for new meeting / WhatsApp transcripts — none since the May 18 Retell snapshots, so the Daily Tasks board was left unchanged this pass
Appended a dated record card to the dashboard timeline + marked the cockpit, then pushed live (v14 → Vercel). Additive only — no record card deleted
Pre-staged the Apollo.io auto-fill for the B2B HR lane (cycle 7) — the 6-HR-leader contact pull is now push-button instead of a 2-3 hr manual LinkedIn+Hunter hunt
Verified the 5 founder gates are still the sole bottleneck — no inbox signal cleared any overnight; every lane underneath remains built and merge-ready
